root.name: Add a text box explaining 'These drawings show standardized proportional relationships' on slide 7
root.description: Evaluates whether the agent successfully added a text box containing the specified explanation to slide 7, and did so in a correct, precise, and non-intrusive manner.

children.name: Text box presence on slide 7
children.description: Checks if a new text box was added to slide 7.

children.name: Text content accuracy
children.description: Checks if the text box contains the required explanation (exact or paraphrased) and nothing extraneous.

children.name: Text box visibility and formatting
children.description: Checks that the text box is clearly visible (not hidden, not outside slide bounds, not overly tiny) and formatting is reasonable.

children.name: No unwanted changes to slide 7
children.description: Checks that no content other than the required text box was added, removed, or modified on slide 7.

scorer.function_code:
def compute_score() -> tuple[str, float]:
    # Use ppt_diff to check for unwanted changes on slide 7
    unwanted = False
    details = []
    slide7_id = None
    for slide in ppt_diff.modified_slides:
        before, after = slide
        if getattr(before, 'slide_number', None) == 7 or getattr(after, 'slide_number', None) == 7:
            slide7_id = after.slide_id
            break
    # Check for elements on slide 7
    # Check for added/removed/modified shapes (not text boxes)
    # For this benchmark, we only expect a single new text box
    # We'll use python-pptx for shape comparison
    import pptx
    from pptx import Presentation
    prs_mod = pptx.Presentation(modified_ppt_path)
    slide_mod = prs_mod.slides[6] if len(prs_mod.slides) >= 7 else None
    prs_orig = pptx.Presentation(original_ppt_path)
    slide_orig = prs_orig.slides[6] if len(prs_orig.slides) >= 7 else None
    if slide_mod is None or slide_orig is None:
        return ("Slide 7 missing in original or modified PPT.", 0.0)
    orig_shapes = [s for s in slide_orig.shapes]
    mod_shapes = [s for s in slide_mod.shapes]
    if len(mod_shapes) > len(orig_shapes)+1:
        details.append("More than one shape added to slide 7.")
        unwanted = True
    if len(mod_shapes) < len(orig_shapes):
        details.append("Shapes removed from slide 7.")
        unwanted = True
    # Check for modified non-text shapes
    orig_nontext_shapes = [s for s in orig_shapes if not s.has_text_frame]
    mod_nontext_shapes = [s for s in mod_shapes if not s.has_text_frame]
    if len(orig_nontext_shapes) != len(mod_nontext_shapes):
        details.append("Non-text shapes modified on slide 7.")
        unwanted = True
    # If unwanted, penalize
    if unwanted:
        return ("; ".join(details), 0.0)
    return ("No unwanted changes detected on slide 7.", 1.0)

metadata.task: Add a text box explaining 'These drawings show standardized proportional relationships' on slide 7
